name: @huynhtandat223/ex-plannotator-pi-extension
description: Persistent annotation-focused review of assistant responses in Pi
author: huynhtandat223

scripts.build: cd ../hook && bunx vite build && cp dist/index.html ../ex-pi-extension/ex-plannotator.html
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run build:plan
scripts.build:plan: cd ../hook && bunx vite build && cp dist/index.html ../ex-pi-extension/ex-plannotator-plan.html
scripts.build:package: bun run build && bun run build:plan
